allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Fix Flask template loading and wrapped.py KeyError issues

- Use absolute paths for Flask template/static folders to work from any working directory \(fixes dashboard.html 500 error\)
- Add defensive setdefault\(\) calls for nested dict keys in wrapped.py to handle incomplete/legacy data structures \(fixes active_channels KeyError\)
- Ensures bot remains stable with old or corrupted data

Co-Authored-By: Claude Haiku 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
